name: Zeaxanthin
summary: Decision-ready summary: Zeaxanthin is best framed for macular pigment support; retinal antioxidant protection; eye-health stacks; safety screen: none significant; review pregnancy supplement stack.
description: Zeaxanthin supports eye health; macular pigment; vision with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v10.0: Zeaxanthin should be presented with lutein/AREDS2 context.
claimMap.notes: v10.0: Zeaxanthin should be presented with lutein/AREDS2 context.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: AREDS2 formula uses lutein 10 mg plus zeaxanthin 2 mg/day
